content: i think we resolved that one in <#874767108809031740> (co location issue), but let me know if it still persists

author: terencechain
content:
how aggressive is Lodestar requesting payload by range? we are getting spammed by the requests but i cant tell if its our bug or not.. Tons of:
```
Serving execution payload envelopes by range request count=1 handler=execution_payload_envelopes_by_range peer=16Uiu2HAkw7e8kyt5H8A53kMtVjAGR67LRaHzCnYHLdqRhRxjm3wi startSlot=15744
```
i've pushed some fixes to prysm's devnet3 branch, but having a really hard time to sync to head of the chain given very limited working nodes to serve valid payload and block. we'll see if we can sync to the head soon

author: nflaig
content: I am sure this is a bug on our end, we are way to aggressiv, been debugging rate limit issues most of last week, we need to fix this

author: nflaig
content: it wasn't as big of an issue when we had more nodes serving data last week
